# Assessment Overview

This index links to supplementary assessment fact documents generated for this report.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md): High-level and component-level architecture diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md): External dependency groups, risks, and test dependency summary.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md): Service catalog, endpoint inventory, and service communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md): Persistence model, repository methods, and data ownership boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md): Configuration sources, runtime/build profiles, and sensitive settings inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md): Core workflows, cross-service data flows, and decision logic.
